Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin uses her spirit to power the Thousand-Mile Cloud to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a valuable transportation item that can be powered by Lindon's madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a mount Lindon uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a construct that Lindon uses to drift.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a horse-sized pillow of opaque red fog.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a rust-colored cloud that Lindon uses to travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a dense red cloud with wisps of essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a construct that uses Forged cloud madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a thing that can be traded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is an object that follows Lindon on a leash of thin madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is made of densely packed cloud madra and can be activated by a single script-circle at its core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a method of flight Lindon mentioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is an object that can be summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a construct that can carry packs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a week away from the Ancestor's Tomb.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud is large enough to carry two buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon's Thousand-Mile Cloud is kept in a polished wood-and-jade chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds are flying creatures or mounts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon has a red Thousand-Mile Cloud drifting behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — A dark blue Thousand-Mile Cloud passed over the cliff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a construct seized by Eithan.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a method of flight used by Jai Daishou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei has a Thousand-Mile Cloud preserved inside her armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn used the Thousand-Mile Cloud to carry people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is the foundation for Sky's Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a deep blue cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Pai Ren uses a personal Thousand-Mile Cloud to fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn woman floats on an emerald Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — He'd found the scripted box that contained one of his most valuable possessions. His own Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds are used by sacred artists to travel through the sky.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a green object used by the Skysworn servant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a technique used to fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a construct that dissipates into essence of cloud madra when its core is struck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud is a golden cloud big enough to hold several houses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's Thousand-Mile Cloud dissipated to mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a giant golden entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Sophara and her retinue were in a silk tent planted on a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a golden cloud that bears a complex of palaces and has hovered outside the Akura fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud is an emerald green floating entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a presence felt by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The gold Thousand-Mile Cloud is hovering over the edge of the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The golden Thousand-Mile Cloud rushes in like a storm's wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Two Truegold dragons drop from the Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Thousand-Mile Cloud is a green madra used to power cloudships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon once kept his Thousand-Mile Cloud in a box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan uses a deep green Thousand-Mile Cloud to float.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Skysworn armor can contain a Thousand-Mile Cloud in a compartment on the back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds can be summoned and dismissed at a thought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The group has Thousand-Mile Clouds stored in their emerald armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Some individuals were in the air on Thousand-Mile Clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud can make an ornate table float.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon stands on a platform supported by a violet Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds are born naturally in the Ninecloud countryside and can be as large as islands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Thousand-Mile Cloud is a construct whose size remains constant for all participants.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Thousand-Mile Cloud is a technique used by Lindon to see over crowds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud is a blue object that can be stood upon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds are used by Underlords to hover above the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud is a type of cloud Little Blue uses to fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon uses a Skysworn Thousand-Mile Cloud to fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds are items that can be possessed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon stands on a green Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon used his Thousand-Mile Cloud to drift back to the camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon was using a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — A green Thousand-Mile Cloud is used for flight.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon and Yerin traveled with the help of a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel travels on a borrowed Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud can act as a base for cloud-rafts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Akura clan Golds hover on the back of a Thousand-Mile Cloud or other floating construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon rises on his Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel's Thousand-Mile Cloud was the remaining flying transport in the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin caught the edge of the Thousand-Mile Cloud where the madra was thinner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Fingers crashed into Lindon's Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius is resting on a white Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's Thousand-Mile Cloud is rust-red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan has a personal Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Thousand-Mile Clouds are used for transportation outside of the Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon can summon a Thousand-Mile Cloud from his void key.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin can call a Thousand-Mile Cloud from her void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon leaped onto a Thousand-Mile Cloud to fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon used his Hollow Domain to catch himself on his Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The newcomer flies in on a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon used a smaller Thousand-Mile Cloud to stabilize Ziel.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — A Thousand-Mile Cloud is a common purple flying vehicle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa flies using a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
